name: Exo-Hex
author: Craig Duncan (2019) / AGP port
description: Craig Duncan's distilled sibling of Side Stitch: a hexhex board whose six sides are flanked OUTSIDE by pre-placed 'exo-stones' — on each side one black and one white string, alternating around the perimeter with empty gaps at the corners. Exo-stones are owned and connective: your groups extend through them. Place one stone per turn (pie rule; pass allowed); when the board fills or both players pass, each group scores the exo-stones it contains and the owner of the single best group wins, ties broken recursively down the group lists.
